overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing exploration of an ancient Greek military camp at night. The player character moves from a map table through the camp, passing wooden fortifications and a waypoint beacon, to discover a piece of armor at a discovery site.

vertical wooden post supporting a canopy or structure

distant snow-capped mountains under night sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens focused on a map table with scrolls in an ancient military camp at night. A guard stands in the background as the camera begins panning right, revealing wooden fortifications and distant mountains under a dark blue sky.

passing a tall glowing blue waypoint beacon in the center of the camp

agents.ego_description: walking through the camp grounds, passing wooden structures and a glowing waypoint marker

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the open camp, passing wooden fortifications and a burning brazier. A glowing blue waypoint beacon stands prominently in the center as the player approaches a wooden storage structure on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: military camp storage area with discovery site

events.description: interacting with the armor discovery site to uncover the ancient item

agents.ego_description: approaching the discovery site and interacting to reveal ancient Greek armor

archaeological discovery point with ancient bronze armor on display
simple wooden workbench or table on the left side

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a wooden storage structure where an armor discovery site is located. After interacting, a UI popup reveals the discovery of ancient bronze armor, displayed on a translucent figure, while the surrounding camp remains quiet and dark.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark ancient military camp that transitions from a strategic planning area to a hidden discovery site. It begins focused on a map table with scrolls, panning right to reveal a guard and wooden fortifications set against a backdrop of distant mountains under a deep blue night sky. As the camera moves further into the open camp, it passes a burning brazier and a glowing blue waypoint beacon before approaching a wooden storage structure. The scene then shifts toward the structure's interior, where the interaction with a discovery site triggers a UI popup displaying ancient bronze armor on a translucent figure. The movement concludes with this reveal while the surrounding camp remains quiet and shrouded in darkness.
